top_signals.title: Altman-Backed Oklo Rises on US Nuclear Reactor Fuel Program
top_signals.summary: Oklo Inc. shares jumped after the the Sam Altman-backed reactor technology company said it’s in talks to participate in a US Department of Energy program to supply nuclear fuel, an effort aimed at relieving potential bottlenecks that threaten to slow the deployment of fission power.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Taseko seeks rebrand as Trekor to reflect growth
top_signals.summary: The Canadian miner seeks shareholder approval for the name change as Florence Copper ramps up and Gibraltar posts strong output.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Vizsla secures $10M in Mexico-backed loan for Panuco project
top_signals.summary: Vizsla CEO calls the facility "another important step" in the continued endorsement of its flagship project in the state of Sinaloa.
